description: Verso: Petition or report to the Fatimid vizier al-Afḍal (r. 1096–1121) regarding a government appointee reporting for duty or fulfilling an order. Including a raʾy clause. There are endorsements (or drafts of formulaic phrases?) in faded ink between the lines; these have not been edited here.
tags: registration, physicians, multihanded, to edit, lost archive, double petition, DIMME
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
